config.chromecast.devices_desc: Manage your Chromecast devices. Use mDNS discovery to find devices on your network, or add them manually. Give each device a friendly name so the agent can address it (e.g. "Living Room").
config.chromecast.no_devices: No Chromecast devices registered. Use "Discover Devices" to find them on your network.
config.chromecast.no_devices_found: No Chromecast devices found on the network. Make sure your devices are powered on and connected to the same network.
config.chromecast.field_name_help: A friendly name for this device (e.g. "Living Room", "Kitchen Speaker"). The agent will use this name to identify the device.
config.chromecast.delete_confirm: Really delete Chromecast device "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
